text.title: Changelog Automation Conventional Commits Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "we need a CHANGELOG for the next release" to "CHANGELOG.md committed + validator green". Decision-gates block on common failures.

step.name: pick-range
step.input: last release tag (range_from), HEAD or proposed tag (range_to).
step.action: Run `git log --no-merges range_from..range_to --pretty=format:'%H%x09%s'`. Confirm linear history (no foreign merge graph).
step.decision-gate: If history is not linear AND merge strategy is "merge" (not squash) — STOP, verdict block-merge-noise.

step.name: parse
step.action: Apply conventional-commits regex: `^(?P<type>feat|fix|chore|refactor|docs|perf|test|build|ci|style)(?:\((?P<scope>[^)]+)\))?(?P<bang>!)?:\s+(?P<subject>.+)$`. Capture breaking via `!:` OR `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer in body.
step.decision-gate: If deviations non-empty — STOP, verdict block-non-conventional (rewrite offending commits OR open exception).

step.name: group
step.action: Assign each to a section by type. Breaking commits also appear in the breaking section regardless of base type. Compute semver_bump per r5.
step.decision-gate: If declared release_version mismatches computed bump — STOP, verdict block-missing-version-bump.

step.name: emit-md
step.action: Render Markdown block: `## [release_version] - release_date`, then `### BREAKING CHANGES` (if any), then per-type sections in canonical order (Features → Fixes → Performance → Refactors → Tests → Docs → Build → CI → Style → Chores). Insert above existing entries in CHANGELOG.md.
step.decision-gate: If artefact does not validate — STOP, fix the section assignment.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-changelog-automation-conventional-commits.py --file path.json`. Block release if non-zero exit.
step.decision-gate: Non-zero exit blocks the release script.
